content: Backend: GET /control-room/line-kpis (availability + downtime per line & per section, window param)
Backend: branding accent hex + logo upload (base64) endpoints
Frontend: pure black theme + dynamic accent CSS vars in index.css
Frontend: outlined button/pill styling (button.jsx + 30 sweep fixes)
Frontend: AppContext applies brand accent + loads/saves ui-prefs
Frontend: Layout sidebar DnD reorder + per-icon colors + custom logo
Frontend: Control Room ribbon v2 (line/section availability + downtime, collapsible plant strip)
Frontend: Administration branding UI (logo upload + hex color)
Test: testing agent full pass + fix issues
